It’s the best! Alena is gentle and gives you good advice, but isn’t pushy at all. California Cosmetics is my one-stop shop for Botox and skin care. They do it all! Dina gave me the best hydrofacial of my life and Marilyn (the owner) is the most kind, helpful person!! She also does an amazing job at Botox!! I cannot say enough good things about CCI and will not go anywhere else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"NAHLA SALAHELDIN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYDgvx_rnfG8Do5mfzbBnkDVpN55JB8FyGIde8CbfBWMmK2A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I couldn’t be happier with my experience at California Cosmetics Medical Institute! From the moment I walk in, I’m always greeted with warmth and professionalism. The entire team is wonderful, and the environment is so clean, calm, and welcoming — I genuinely look forward to every visit.
A special and heartfelt thank-you to Alena, who has truly made all the difference in my skincare journey. From day one, she took the time to assess my skin, listen to my concerns, and create a personalized treatment plan just for me. We started with chemical peels to prepare and refresh my skin, and then moved on to Pico laser treatments — and the results have been amazing!
My skin is noticeably brighter, smoother, and more even. Years of pigmentation and texture issues have started to fade, and for the first time, I feel confident going out without makeup. Alena’s care, attention to detail, and genuine passion for what she does really shine through. She always makes me feel informed, comfortable, and in the best hands.
If you’re thinking about improving your skin or starting a treatment plan, I can’t recommend California Cosmetics Medical Institute — and especially Alena — enough. She’s the absolute best, and I’m so grateful I found her!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lynette Colletta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXr0atxLRv-40TU2dF7lb9ahjFKEWPxf8m_C3oqbnClVCDXmKE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been a client of California Cosmetic Medical Institute for nearly 20 years and always have a wonderful experience! I always leave feeling refreshed and happy with my results!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"L C gmail","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIkQUbV2DO54KHsYOdc-8PHqTtvn_5st5ki2C5a1RGxsqHU5SuO=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had a CO2 laser treatment with Phoebe, and I can honestly say she is phenomenal! In the skin industry, I know firsthand that going to the right provider is absolutely critical—this is not a treatment you want done by someone without in-depth training. Thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vickie Leow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJuYW0Zyd9Z6UrtSP-UwdbLTyrNlxSUBVwJWGqUoO1lotPEIA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My experience at Bay Area Dermatology was far from being favorable. The staff was very friendly, however I felt that the physician, who was treating me was pushing the Obagi products and treatments to consider in the future before she addressed the reason why I was there. After my treatment, I was handed a bill which included a consultation fee of $275 and $450 for the treatment. I thought it was outrageous! Most offices will charge a consultation fee if the patient chooses NOT to be treated. This is the first time I had to pay the consultation fee as well as the treatment. I was stunned and felt robbed. As I was leaving the office, I was handed a list of recommended Obagi products instead of recommendations for post treatment care. I would never recommend this office to anyone and I will never return for any further treatments. This office is very unprofessional and places making money ahead of patient care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chandra Gordon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIweReJpbRV5ujYzC2Yvb5_eiMs7LVmmVZFA1gTf-jEUfx2vQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience was excellent. All of the staff are professional and kind. Mary Krempa RN explained everything in detail before my Tixel treatment, which was done very efficiently with little to no pain. I will be returning to see her for the rest of my treatments. I highly recommend Mary Krempa RN and this practice as a whole.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"L. Marie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6sVIyLHa_DkIE4xHTptQq67bsnls6BIOpF1ephrvlmt3R-BJG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been seeing Dr. Austin for years. She is progressive and has a keen eye for maladies of the skin which matches her expertise with all things cosmetic.
Initially, I had sun damaged skin and had lost hope and confidence, but after seeing her and following her instruction my skin improved more than I could have imagined. Then, I became lax with the more intensive parts of my program and now I can see the changes in my skin.
So, I’m once again dedicated to having her guide me through the  journey to more beautiful healthy skin. I must say, it takes commitment, consistency, and of course it can be costly, but the reward is worth it!
I trust only Dr. Austin with my skin and I have seen many derms over the years. I highly, highly recommend her.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ann H.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6pgaUHNTH7oGxaQeqKraWel9l-J_AIM23-uZxRkFx6kbxUGk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This review is long overdue.

As I got older, I became more self-conscious and insecure about my double chin. It simply wouldn’t go away, even after losing weight following the birth of my child several years ago. After debating for a long time about what to do, I finally decided to start searching for a plastic surgeon in the Bay Area.

I consulted with four doctors in total, with Dr. Eric Li being the last. Unlike my previous consultations, which all felt rushed, Dr. Li took the time to truly listen, understand my concerns, and discuss my goals. He recommended submental liposuction, a minimally invasive procedure with little downtime. What really stood out was his unique suggestion to use the fat from under my chin and transfer it to my chin for better balance and definition, rather than opting for a chin implant, which I didn’t even think about when I started this journey.

The procedure went incredibly smoothly, and my recovery was complication-free. Now, three months post-op, I couldn’t be happier with my results. I feel more confident, happier, and like my old self again all thanks to Dr. Li.

I highly recommend Dr. Li if you’re looking for an extremely skilled surgeon in the Bay Area. He’s attentive, knowledgeable, and always striving to learn modern techniques so he can provide the most up-to-date care for his patients. The ladies in his office are amazing too! Kind, attentive, and incredibly helpful especially nurse Sunshine.

I will definitely be returning to Dr. Li and the CA Aesthetics team for any future cosmetic procedures.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKwUdX_EIA78jKhlNJp2nn4xQz3SCD5dV_MCkSSNvQIV5DR8KU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had the pleasure of undergoing a procedure with Dr. Li, and I couldn't be happier with the entire experience. After obtaining quotes from three reputable plastic surgeons, I found Dr. Li's proposal to be the most comprehensive, and promising the best aesthetic results. His attention to detail and commitment to achieving excellence set him apart. I was impressed by the welcoming atmosphere of his practice and the professionalism of his staff. Communication with Dr. Li and his staff was excellent. Dr. Li himself was incredibly thorough in addressing my questions and concerns, ensuring I was well-prepared and comfortable with the process. The results exceeded my expectations, and I am absolutely thrilled with the outcome. Without a doubt, I would choose Dr. Li again for any future procedures.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"leanna vu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXdC-Ervb0VROLxpuILzdlr3_d0gqz6z1VvYTJBHwtCp3HJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"my friend's little sister got a breast augmentation from Dr. Li and told me she loved her doctor.

i only did one consult which was dr. li and immediately booked a surgical date. i didn't do any research beforehand and when it was close to the surgical date i was a little nervous; however, the results came out amazing! he did everything i wanted which was to make my breast look even, have natural results, and have a closer cleavage.

i'm about 6 weeks post opp and i get compliments from my friends all the time! they say it looks really natural and full, and how my breasts look like twins and not sisters.

overall, i have a really good experience with Dr. Li and will recommend him to all of my friends. the team is super accommodating and nice too","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Prabhjot Kaur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8uZIGBUeC0OoB2RxQkX0dyNYdnRj7oIN5Ak7CWAiSwk51Nck=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an amazing microneedling experience with Nurse Cindy. She is incredibly professional, meticulous, and truly detail-oriented. From the very beginning to the end of the appointment, she made the entire experience feel seamless and comfortable.

Cindy took the time to make sure I was fully numb and at ease before starting, which I really appreciated. She explained each step thoroughly, answered all of my questions, and made me feel completely confident in her care. Her attention to detail and calm, reassuring presence really set her apart.

She also provided clear, thoughtful post-care instructions and made sure I understood exactly how to care for my skin and what to expect before my next session. I left feeling well informed, comfortable, and excited about my results. I highly recommend Cindy to anyone looking for a skilled and compassionate aesthetic nurse.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kelly Eke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLy_pqRo61CyWqh9do3NJJO4Q27Wh3xURuN0Y-feX_F7hsErA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can't say enough good things about my experience with Dr. Li! He listened to my concerns and goals and went above and beyond to make sure I felt confident in every decision. The results speak for themselves! I’ve never felt so happy and confident in my own skin. Choosing Dr. Li was the best decision I could’ve made, and I am beyond grateful for his expertise.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura jenifer Plascencia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX59C4PxHrin_FDZPndfW5MgbY_JtXnjDMWGVTLdDgSgeORzmHk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had surgery revision,Breast and abdominoplasty. I was very unhappy with the work I had gotten done 2 years ago with a different surgeon!, so I reach out to Dr. Eric Li. I had the best experience with him and his team. Since the very begging he was very honest of what to expect and to this day Im super happy of how my results are looking! I love how my abdomen looks and how my breast look . Before everything was crocked and my breast very unlike they look very different To each other! Now I feel new and I can look at the mirror and be happy with myself! I’m happy that I made decision of coming to him and he’s team! Can’t wait completely heal and see the final results ! I highly recommend Dr. Li and he’s team.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETPx219n00_3eDYpGFFPPVSsPAfUSQxrN0BMlLqiAHvDcZ1tBB731NwS_2LAQi8EITruShCLgvSV91vqNCSCwzY2G_fCFuukbLMY9nnfzF1AeBOai5Lvl1WfmLBqTQDJQ5ohdE6V7mJixos"],"When":"2025-12-25"},{"Name":"Vivian Fung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXK3o_9Q9lMRwp3j_TpLq57Fgr-qlPbB_-qqqGHs89vXd2NA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"NO ONE wants to get corrective surgery for reconstruction surgery following a mastectomy. The additional risks & ordeal of an extra procedure makes it really important to get everything thing right the FIRST TIME.

My first reconstruction was done by a surgeon who was competent, but ignored my requests for compact implants, giving me ones that were too large and heavy for my body frame. If I could do it over again, I would fight harder to obliterate all the obstacles that prevented me from having Dr. Li work on my initial reconstruction.

Dr. Li helped develop several workable options to replace, tighten & lift, to address my concerns. He also exercised good judgment to make additional improvements to enhance the aesthetics. I was very happy with the process and the results are good.

Dr. Li is a rare professional who possess the creativity & technical expertise that allow him to achieve superlative aesthetic standards.

I wish Dr. Li had done the 1st reconstruction.  There would have had been more material to deploy & the results could have been even better.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jacob A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK52ZdZT6Ou4_ix7p0rzXHYjG_DDQR6WwrjJtz2zsaQHlpIQA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had great consultation experience with Dr. Li. He is very nice and professional. He answered all my questions with great clarity and patience. I feel more confident in my upcoming surgery. I am looking forward to scheduling my procedures with CA Aesthetics!

Update: I had an amazing experience with Dr. Li. He was professional and very kind, and my surgery was a complete success. The staff at his office were always friendly and quick to respond, making every visit a pleasure. I couldn't be more satisfied with my results. My face looks younger and thinner, but the change is so natural that people just assume I've lost weight. For anyone who wants a natural, artistic result, I highly recommend Dr. Li.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lorena MN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUI7v7NWq5b4IBolmIdROlJ0zEiShYjQLf_DweJN_8VbdeGDSmAdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
I was nervous going in, but the moment I walked into the operating room, Dr. Jiri Konecny and his team immediately put me at ease. Everyone was calm, kind, and reassuring, and Dr. Jiri talked to me the entire time, which made the whole experience feel surprisingly easy and even wonderful.

At the end of the surgery, Dr. Jiri showed me what he jokingly called the “chicharrón” referring to my skin,  and I was honestly amazed that I even saw it and touched it 😅. That moment perfectly reflects his approach: confident, skilled, transparent, and able to keep things light while staying completely professional.

What makes this experience even more special is that we met Dr. Jiri and his wife, Jana, who is an amazing nurse, years ago at the wineries. Life happened and we postponed the surgery, but coming back years later felt like reconnecting with people we already trusted.

Dr. Jiri, Jana, and the entire Estea team are truly stellar. Professional, warm, and exceptional from start to finish. I recommend their services and products","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anaïs Pham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0Hr-xgMr-UvJNrx6Ap61e3bSFRJGO00mv-a-C0025cuPZKg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Aliksanian is truly a magician. I've had Botox and Xeomin several times in the past and was always underwhelmed by the results, until I went to MedbeautyLA.
She actually knows what she's doing: the right technique, the right amount, and results that look natural and flawless. On top of that, she takes the time to listen, gives honest advice, and really cares about your skin concerns. Hands down the best experience I've had with injectables.

Edit after my 2nd appointment :
I recently had Botox done with Danielle at MedbeautyLA and I’m honestly blown away by the results. I’ve had Botox at several other places before, but the technique she used felt completely different. She was incredibly precise and really took the time to assess my face instead of using a standard injection pattern.

What amazed me the most is how quickly it started setting in. I was already seeing results the next day, which has never happened to me before. The result looks so smooth and natural while still keeping my expressions.

I’ve also seen Dr. Aliksanian before and both of them truly have amazing techniques. You can tell they really understand what they’re doing and care about getting the best, most natural results possible.

MedbeautyLA has easily become my go-to place for injectables and I couldn’t recommend Danielle and Dr. Aliksanian more.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"beth nelson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIP4amjgbicy97hmI6nqkS5rKok8hTh8GyFnLS4KYAhcGoV3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love Med Beauty LA they are kind professional and supportive. I feel so taken care of at this spa.
I opted for the diamond glow facial that
Exfoliates skin to reveal a brighter, smoother complexion; Extracts debris and congestion to unclog pores; Infuses skin with nourishing serums for skin rejuvenation. My skin is so clean and bright now. Moisturized too… I can’t wait as long now in between appointments my skin feels so wonderful. Try Med Beauty LA you will love this place too…","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matt Stasi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCdR_prVbzaBOoXRzrnkHwlx6tNRAsVRziKNp8zf_PSDlmtIwY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best IPL treatment in LA! The staff at MEDBEAUTYLA explained skin resurfacing and had me follow up with a Salt Facial.  They really care about problems skin like mine and I’m noticing significant improvement. Two thumbs way up!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caroline B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGaztKwcfLt0YP51YxG1duhm1jDrSXM0_mP0y11CZbgacAJEPR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I came in for a little bit of hylenex, a product I've gotten many times before. I expressed concern to the doctor several times about injecting without ultrasound (I came to her specifically because she offered it) and she assured me we didn't "need" it, which was disappointing because it can only improve the treatment.

After the consultation, she went straight into injecting, and there was a lot of product left in the vial when she was finished... but I was charged for 6cc's (4 vials) of product. This seemed like a mistake considering that she told me we were going light with the treatment. The receptionists had a difficult time even figuring out the unit of measurement I was even charged in.

I was shocked by the $510 price, and the receptionist told me "I should know what prices are before I come in or stop the appointment if I would like to know", which was disappointing knowing I didn't have 4 syringes of product injected, there are no hylenex prices on their website, and that what you want going in is often different than what you land on in the consultation. I do not believe I was charged the correct amount for the amount of product that was used, and I don't like the explanation I received. This was a disappointing experience.

Update-- It's been some time and no one has attempted to reach out to remedy this. I also haven't noticed any improvement since my treatment. I feel like I just threw $500 away.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Swetha K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKStdVDLkdr3I970w4GHEkp1dozuBl87o_yY8GWLgCjadIqjA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I struggled with acne scars on my face for years, and honestly, it was something I had begun to believe would never improve. I had tried countless treatments and even underwent a CO2 laser procedure before, but unfortunately I saw little to no change in my skin. That experience left me feeling discouraged and dejected.

Everything changed when I had my CO2 laser treatment with RN Jasmine last November.

From the beginning, Jasmine demonstrated an exceptional level of skill, knowledge, and care. CO2 laser treatments require extremely precise settings and depth — especially for melanin-rich, South Asian skin tones like mine, where the risk of complications can be higher if not performed correctly. Jasmine understood this deeply and tailored the treatment perfectly for my skin.

The results have honestly been life-changing. I have seen at least a 50–60% improvement in my acne scars — something I had never achieved despite years of treatments. For the first time, I felt real hope as my skin continued to improve month after month.

I waited patiently to make sure the results were lasting, and I can confidently say that the improvements are permanent and genuine. Beyond the physical transformation, Jasmine helped restore confidence that I had slowly lost because of my acne scarring.

I am incredibly grateful to Jasmine for her expertise, precision, and compassion. She truly made a difference not just in my skin, but in how I feel about myself. Thank you from the bottom of my heart.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karen S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJMel0IZ88k3l8yYHvlZt3Ge-HDDRA4y75TcDDrjEzIn89p4w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an appointment with Vanessa, for a Botox treatment. Prices are reasonable compared to other prices. I don’t mind driving in one hour to come to this place I definitely recommend it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul Leon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI7T4gAsVMVM3rz5pkYGeqkfx4gsi6OuwtBfOm3O7clTriJsA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had the pleasure of experiencing the Botox services at this clinic, and I am truly impressed by the exceptional level of customer service, attention, and professionalism that I encountered throughout the entire process.

From the moment I walked in, I was greeted by a warm and friendly receptionist who made me feel instantly welcome. The atmosphere of the clinic was soothing and inviting, creating an environment that eased any nerves I had about the procedure.

The attention to detail and personalized care I received were truly outstanding. The medical staff took the time to sit down with me, thoroughly discuss my goals, and address any concerns I had. Their willingness to listen and provide expert advice put me at ease and assured me that I was in capable hands.

What truly sets this clinic apart is their unwavering commitment to professionalism. The medical professionals were not only highly skilled but also incredibly knowledgeable about the Botox treatment and its effects. They took the time to educate me about the procedure, ensuring that I had a clear understanding of what to expect.

Throughout the procedure itself, I was consistently impressed by the gentle touch and precision of the practitioner. The emphasis on my comfort and well-being was evident, making the experience virtually painless and comfortable. The attention to detail in administering the Botox injections was evident, as the results were exactly as I had hoped for.

The post-procedure follow-up was another testament to the clinic's dedication to their clients. The staff reached out to check on my progress and were available to answer any questions I had as I noticed the effects of the treatment settling in.

Overall, my experience with the Botox services at this clinic was exceptional. The combination of their customer service, attention to individual needs, and professionalism left me with not only fantastic results but also a sense of confidence in their services. I can wholeheartedly recommend this clinic to anyone seeking Botox treatments, as they truly go above and beyond to ensure a positive and rewarding experience.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I sure am glad that I came here today. 😁","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miss Q","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4wDMjOeyDrqUwhCD3ApwB54Be7KIJ2yc1lDe1NWNNu22qjcYt=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"NP Parmeet Singh was very thorough. She took time to explain the diagnosis & treatment options. She did not rush. Showed compassion. Appt was at 2:30pm, my son had been seen and received treatment and we were out of there at 3 o’clock. Very professional!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aaliyah Haqq","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJW54TZTiXhwdTuEZyaAWIYaQ6NmDo8CAYkYVlKxzPPqJ18Xw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had my first appointment with Parmeet regarding a recurring cyst under my right arm that I’ve been dealing with since December 2024. Urgent care previously drained it but did not remove the sac, which caused the issue to continue coming back.

After being approved for surgery in October 2025, I was told by another surgery center they couldn’t perform the procedure until April 2026. Because this has been an ongoing and painful issue, my primary doctor referred me here. I met with Parmeet in November 2025. She explained that they only perform procedures once a month and suggested I wait for the April surgery elsewhere instead of proceeding with her office.

Due to how long I’ve already been dealing with this, I chose to move forward and scheduled my procedure with Parmeet. Shortly after, her office called attempting to cancel my appointment, but I declined because I didn’t want to continue delaying treatment. My appointment was confirmed for January 7, 2026.

On January 2, 2026, I received a call stating there were issues with my insurance authorization, even though my authorization does not expire until March 2026. I was then told my appointment had to be canceled and pushed back to February 2026.

Overall, this experience has been frustrating and disappointing. When you’re dealing with a recurring medical issue that affects your daily comfort and quality of life, being repeatedly delayed and discouraged from care is very discouraging. I felt like my concerns were not taken seriously, and I expected better communication and advocacy from a provider I was referred to for help.

She also said she can refill my antibiotics prescription for my arm until the procedure but it’s been difficult trying to get refills. They don’t even return my calls anymore !","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Dina Gorovich","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUezEInmti1o5c5nccTsPQQ-YtGUKHcxU2QWi0AdIlMQK6ydvBerA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Title: Front Desk Failure – No Communication – Unauthorized Voucher Use

The front desk at Silicon Valley Aesthetics is disorganized and unreliable.

They sent multiple conflicting appointment times within minutes (10:30 → 10:00 → 10:30).
They did not answer the phone.
They did not send any text confirmations.

When I arrived after driving over 1.5 hours, the front desk stated:
“Our system is not working. If you have T-Mobile, you don’t get messages or calls.”
This is not acceptable for any medical spa.

The service was not provided.
The provider was unavailable.
There was zero communication.
One of my vouchers was marked as ‘used’ without any service.

This front desk shows:
• no operational standards
• no communication
• no accountability
• unauthorized voucher handling
• complete disregard for client time

Not recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Janet Melesurgo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVXX8Mx7IbcqtXLZjiXxV3mMBp9aORQxSmZwa0tAnvUVqGthyIMg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"“I started coming here a few years ago and have always had great service. Only then did I know how grateful I was for mystique. Abby fixed my lips after that tragedy and now I am very happy with them. She also did my chin filler and it looks amazing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lisa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2voS3wzARKlqI2UrbxLiriQz1VTfUiFvThZcXEa-tRcul2U4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mystique is amazing! The staff is incredibly friendly and welcoming, and my Diamond Glow with Trisha was absolutely wonderful! I left feeling refreshed and my skin is still glowing after a week! Highly recommend!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"M. Ortega","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2hkjENTkt9jr7k-EPDG1Ty2U72oz-XAkpO69ENNiArxxlAERE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I am writing to express my deep disappointment with the service I experienced at your Fresno location. I was scheduled for an appointment at 7:50 a.m., yet when I arrived, the doors were locked and no staff were present. I attempted to call but received no answer.
I had taken the morning off from work specifically for this appointment, which meant both lost time and lost income. Since no one was there, I eventually had to leave to return to work. At 8:15 a.m., I received a call from a staff member who not only contacted me well past my scheduled time but also spoke to me in an unprofessional and dismissive manner. I made it clear that I had already been at the location, and I encouraged her to review your security cameras and the recorded call for confirmation.
This experience reflects poorly on the professionalism of your staff and on Mystique Medical Spa’s commitment to customer care. Scheduling clients for 7:50 a.m. but not opening on time is unacceptable.
As a result, I will be canceling my membership. Since I have prepaid for my treatments, I will complete those sessions, but I will not be renewing or returning thereafter. Additionally, I will be sharing my experience with family and friends so they are aware of the lack of reliability and professionalism at your Fresno location.
I hope you take this feedback seriously and make the necessary improvements to ensure no other client has to go through the same experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Corin McCoy Barba","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI1tAXM2y2ccPwjwQ5wJw3VrEIdXqDBwFCsVRKk0ogYwicswg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I did not get what I paid for Infant one of the services that I prepaid for was taken from me and they did not have good customer friendly service when this issue was being discussed , they should have made things right in the office at that time when I had the problem/situation occurring but they chose not to and tried to call after everything had occurred (um no.) I think the only thing that is important to them is money , money, money they don’t care about fixing your issues. It’s all about how deep your pockets are. I could go into my experience and what happened to me, but it is really too much to explain here. I am just going to say that I would never recommend this place to anybody and I do not believe that they really care about helping you with your acne, hypertension or any other issues you may have. I do believe it is all about the money and how much you are willing to spend and if an issue  comes up it’s your problem not theirs. Please don’t expect them to make things right… not unless you want to spend MORE Money. Maybe others have had different outcomes (I hope so)  but this was my experience and I would think twice before making an appointment. I was never issued credit or refunded for my prepaid service that I never received so if you do decide to go with this place be careful and don’t pay for service a head of time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Catherine Reece","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ43_9cLLWvt3juDcNn4SQOJuei-r07t_qEWswhw2i-SFLtzQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Words cannot express how grateful I am for this place!! Top-notch professionals, kind, knowledgeable, and most of all dedicated to giving you a great experience!! Self-care has never felt better. Nothing like it in the Fresno area every time I walk through the doors, I feel like I’m the only patient! Truly grateful for this one of a kind facility.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Patricia Morrison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfTOa-yr0XYEkmqGputIPElh9hiCoKQzKSOql9ELBCqeUUjkYcHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Extraordinarily friendly (without seeming false), helpful and informative! I will most likely be returning again for another procedure in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kayleen Aquino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZcuFp_UxvyffSTVqLosdUlJTut5vC0TnG4ucz5dxhkNxxp5M=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had chin liposuction and buccal fat removal in September 2025 at Latina Med Spa. Unfortunately, my experience has been very disappointing both medically and in terms of results.

Prior to surgery, I mainly met with a coordinator and did not receive a thorough evaluation from the physician regarding whether I was a good candidate, realistic expectations, or whether additional procedures (such as chin projection considerations) might be necessary. Looking back, I feel proper medical assessment and expectation setting was lacking.

A few days after surgery, I developed severe and worsening pain. I contacted the office and was instructed to come in urgently. When I arrived, there was no medical provider present, only a coordinator examined me, despite the level of pain I was experiencing. I was told to return days later.

The pain became so severe that I went to the hospital, where a nurse practitioner suspected a hematoma. This was later confirmed by the surgeon. Although the pain eventually resolved, I am now over four months post-op and see no visible improvement in my chin or facial contour. My family and friends also confirm there has been no noticeable change.

Additionally, there were no routine follow-up appointments scheduled or initiated by the clinic after surgery.

I invested significant savings into this procedure and feel let down by the lack of appropriate medical follow-up and the absence of results. I hope the clinic takes accountability and improves patient care and communication going forward.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKW0dB-z6Nnpj_G4rRu7lH9pBNwCNVxjXZReuEmXpLvy6NRt4c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The worst customer service ever Bianca" the coordinator " Never reached out !!

No one seemed interested in actually helping or even listening. Every question I asked was met with attitude, short answers, or zero effort to provide a solution.

I wasn’t expecting perfection, but basic professionalism would’ve been nice. Instead, I was left waiting, transferred around, and treated like an inconvenience. By the end, I still didn’t get the help I needed.

She listened to my concerns, provided straight forward recommendations and didnt try to sell me on things I didn’t need. The filler came out great and looked natural and not over done; however, after about two weeks I still noticed what looked like bruising and reached out to see if I may need some adjustments. She was very responsive in getting me in to follow up. Come to find out the filler was reflecting off my veins and caused a bluish tent that looked like a bruise because my skin was too thin. It was bummer because with makeup it was smooth and looked great but i don't wear makeup daily so it had to be corrected. Unfortunately, it had to be dissolved and she recommended Growth Factor which promotes your own tissue to grow and fill in rather than the filler. I was disappointed but glad I had another treatment option and I appreciated her honest feedback and recommendation. I did the Growth factor and I look forward to seeing my final results in the coming weeks. Everyone in this office is warm and friendly and I felt super comfortable at my consultation, and I was so happy to hear that Dr. Walker saw the same issues I did and she was confident in her plan to fix them. I booked the breast revision surgery and I am so grateful that I did. My experience here was night and day compared to my last breast augmentation. My pre procedure anxiety and post procedure pain was taken care of. I received great post op teaching and 4 months later I can tell my results are holding up much better.

I was treated to a complimentary hydrafacial with their amazing esthetician Nyaz and have since signed up for the membership because she has absolutely changed my skin for the better and has really educated me on the use of medical grade skin care products.

Laser scar care was also included in the cost of the revision and while I’m still healing from that I can definitely see improvements in the scar already. She even treated my 5 year old tummy tuck scar and I am so impressed with the results.

Lastly, I received Botox from their nurse injector Katelyn and we did a consultation for some other services and I am excited for the results. Prices were very reasonable for the level of expertise providing the service.

Everyone in the office spoke so highly of Dr. Walker and I can tell she really cares about her staff and patients. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sam “Sam J.” Jack","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFzPAFe5BiCTdodemJvw0A3Cbj9NoUvEfE4bqiJ7UVIXkFig=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had my breast implants removed by Dr. White and it was the best decision I could have made! Unfortunately, I got a contracture that caused me a lot of pain in my right breast and I decided to move forward with the removal process. He explained how the most important part of this surgery is going to be how compliant I am during my recovery process so I can get the best results possible.
I chose Dr. White because of his experience, bedside manner, and because I knew I'd be meeting with him for all my follow up appointments. I even got to know the staff quite well since I called often to ask questions.
I got this procedure done over a year ago and I love my results! Although the compression is extremely annoying it's also the reason my breasts look amazing and don't need a revision surgery. I'm so glad I trusted Dr. White and his staff to take care of me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Annie Rose","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-G_e1Y3ngpPW8YPAd7dYTOORRgVVPHzTalgQyb7QM6k6iYg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had breast augmentation with Dr. White in Dallas on December 3, 2024, and I honestly could not be happier with the entire experience.

Before the surgery, I was extremely nervous. For years, I held back because I was worried about side effects, pain, and the fear of ending up with results that didn't look natural or suit my body. But after meeting Dr. White and seeing his extensive portfolio of successful cases, I felt like I was in the absolute best hands.

What impressed me most was how Dr. White customized the procedure specifically for me. He didn't just offer a one-size-fits-all approach—he listened to what I wanted and used his expertise to create a plan that would give me a beautiful, natural-looking result that fits my frame perfectly.

After the procedure, I am thrilled to say the results are ideal. I experienced virtually no pain, no uncomfortable side effects, and my recovery has gone exactly as expected—smooth and completely under control. It has been such a positive experience from start to finish.

I also have to mention Dr. White’s team. Every single person in the office was warmhearted, friendly, and incredibly patient with all my questions. They truly made me feel cared for.

If you are considering breast augmentation and want a surgeon who is experienced, meticulous, and genuinely cares about giving you a perfect, personalized result—I absolutely recommend Dr. White. I am so glad I finally went through with it, and I couldn't have asked for a better outcome.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pamela Graham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKz61Z0QKtyylfRzeW7KF24FG573RSUGJFsml3J4Wr-4u_04Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had the privilege of having Dr. Steven White at USA Plastic Surgery in Dallas perform my septoplasty, turbinoplasty, and rhinoplasty. I chose Dr. White because he is board-certified in both plastic surgery and otolaryngology, which makes him uniquely qualified to address both the function and appearance of the nose. After speaking with him, it was clear how passionate he is about achieving the right balance between aesthetics and proper breathing function.

As the wife of a North Texas anesthesiologist who has worked with Dr. White in the operating room over the years, I felt especially confident in my decision. My husband has always considered Dr. White one of the very best, and now I can wholeheartedly say the same.

I first consulted with Dr. White nearly 10 years ago, but at the time, fear of post-surgical pain held me back. Over the past year, my breathing issues worsened to the point where I knew it was time to move forward. I am so glad I did. My procedure went smoothly, and my pain level was minimal — far less than I had imagined. Looking back, I only wish I had done it sooner.

Not only has my breathing improved significantly, but the appearance of my nose has also improved thanks to the structural support Dr. White added to ensure proper function. What truly sets him apart from other plastic surgeons is his deep understanding of both the anatomy and the importance of combining function with aesthetics.

My experience with USA Plastic Surgery was exceptional from start to finish. Dr. White has a wonderful bedside manner. He takes time to thoroughly educate his patients and shows genuine care and concern. I never once felt rushed, and he always made sure I fully understood every step of the process.

I also can’t say enough about the incredible office staff. From the very beginning, they went above and beyond to make me feel comfortable and supported. They answered questions, returned calls, and responded to emails with patience and kindness. They are knowledgeable, professional, and truly lovely people.

If you are considering this or any procedure, I highly recommend Dr. White and his team. They are simply outstanding.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elizabeth Morton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL3nPGKxb_nR4RWwU-9KW7sSOXe4huKdlVLJhxJLmG_7vefmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a breast reduction and lift with Dr. White in Dallas, and overall I’m very happy with my experience. Going into surgery, my biggest hesitation was the wise pattern scarring. That was my main concern, and after consulting with six different surgeons in the Dallas area, Dr. White stood out immediately. He took my concerns seriously, explained everything clearly, and I truly felt that scarring prevention and quality healing were a priority for him, not an afterthought.

What I appreciated most was his attention to detail and his willingness to take his time to perfect each side rather than rushing through the procedure. That level of care gave me a lot of confidence in my decision. I’ve also done everything possible on my end to support the best outcome, including hyperbaric therapy and strictly following post-op instructions, which makes me optimistic about how my scars will continue to heal.

My breasts did end up smaller than I initially anticipated or would have preferred, and I’m still emotionally adjusting to their new size. That said, I feel confident that every possible step was taken to achieve the best, safest, and healthiest result overall, and I trust the process as my body continues to heal.

I would 100% recommend Dr. White to anyone considering breast surgery, especially if you value attention to detail, thoughtful planning, and a surgeon who genuinely cares about long-term outcomes and aesthetics.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stacy Zoeller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLdvv5IEMWbFRvMLJ0sU0JjsCRudDkg1Bbof1655sRI1ZWT=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a modified tummy tuck in Dallas and it’s one of the best things I’ve done for myself as it’s really boosted my confidence. Prior to picking a surgeon I was nervous about what would my results look like and what would the scar look like, after an extensive amount of research and meeting multiple different surgeons I went with Dr. White as he has very strong results and made me feel confident about the procedure. His results also looked the most natural and he had also worked with patients that had massive weight loss and the results were great! It was an important decision on who I wanted to do the surgery as I had worked hard to lose over 100lbs. Dr White and his team are very supportive, professional and great to work with!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steven Heisen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHYupY9Dc8fM-D_B5zDMyb4J3R5bBF_7QKi60TH5grdVvdpQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The procedure I had is called upper and lower Blepharoplasty. The procedure was performed in Dallas by Dr. Steven J. White from USA Plastic Surgery.

I was initially reluctant to have the surgery due to the unknown of never having a surgery like this before. I didn’t know who to trust as a great surgeon, and I was concerned about how I would look after the procedure was completed and everything healed. After doing research about the best board certified plastic surgeons for this kind of procedure, I chose Dr. White based on reviews, meeting him in person, talking and walking through the process, and his exceptional staff. In the first few minutes of meeting him, it’s easy to see why he is the best at what he does. He’s very thorough, detailed and expects perfection in his work and the outcome. He was very considerate of how I felt, and took the time to answer my questions. His staff of Cosmetic Surgery Consultants, Melanie, Jamie, and Sierra are also a big reason for choosing to go with Dr. White. They helped walk me through the process of pre-surgery preparation and post surgery follow up, photos, and appointments. Melanie was the main coordinator for my procedure. She helped facilitate scheduling pricing, pre-surgery appointments, and help me address some challenges when I needed it most to ensure my procedure was successful.

Today I feel incredible about the outcome. It is everything I hoped it would be and more. All went as described by Dr. White prior to the procedure.

I had this procedure because when I looked in the mirror, I felt and looked old, tired, and was frustrated about encounters with ageism. I knew if I had this type of procedure that it would make me look younger and reduce the age factor. New employment at my age is tough to get as it is, but I am far more confident now about the possibilities in the future.

I would recommend Dr. White to anyone wanting the same type of procedure. It’s life-changing. I plan to have Dr. White perform other procedures I may want in the future. Thank you, Dr White, Melanie, Jamie, and Sierra!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"D C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfeRtba9iH1RNt18zxqPYB3sojIO9pEkfARlvP6R6r248n-OZm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I couldn’t be happier with my experience. I recently underwent an upper blepharoplasty, lower blepharoplasty, and brow lift (upper face lift) with Dr. Steven White in Dallas, TX, and the results have been truly exceptional. This was actually my second procedure with Dr. White—I had a breast augmentation several years ago—and once again, he exceeded every expectation. The level of trust and confidence I have in him is truly unmatched.
From the very beginning, Dr. White made me feel completely comfortable and confident. He took the time to thoroughly explain each step of the process, answered all of my questions, and ensured the plan aligned perfectly with my goals. His precision and artistic eye are evident in the results—my eyes look brighter, refreshed, and completely natural.

The entire team was warm, professional, and incredibly supportive throughout the experience. My recovery was smoother than I ever anticipated, and I felt guided and reassured every step of the way.  I never experienced pain at all!

I am currently three to four weeks post-surgery and already look refreshed and more youthful. I can’t wait to see how amazing the results continue to be as I heal.

I am extremely grateful for Dr. White’s skill and expertise. I would trust him again without hesitation and highly recommend him to anyone considering cosmetic surgery.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Madison Thomas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLOpcdXzaHMP0lKOPN8pyHdRxftWtiInVeC9JzFPJTzPFozMg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a nurse, I did extensive research before choosing a surgeon for my breast augmentation — and I can confidently say Dr. White was the absolute best decision I could have made. His knowledge and expertise in plastic surgery are truly unmatched. From my very first consultation, he made me feel comfortable, informed, and completely confident in my choice.

Not only did my results exceed my expectations, but the entire experience was seamless from start to finish. I have several friends who’ve also had amazing experiences with Dr. White, and now I understand why he has some of the best reviews in Dallas. He gave me back my confidence, and I would recommend him to absolutely anyone considering plastic surgery.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I had chin filler done here with Maggie and quickly realized it wasn’t something I liked for myself. This wasn’t about blaming Maggie or saying anything was done incorrectly. it was a personal realization about my face, my insecurities, and whether cosmetic procedures were the right choice for me at that time. I had a long conversation with the her, and while she did try to understand, it felt difficult to communicate that personal preference alone was my reason for wanting the filler dissolved. The filler was dissolved, but I was told I would not be treated again. This experience made me realize how important it is to slow down, ask more questions, and consider consulting a board-certified dermatologist before making cosmetic decisions. [{"Name":"Brittany Gates","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVNWOa22ioTH99-8AUR2CSWZ8fSaXbnbg0UAHDj3CtX-20ks8IT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Former patient of Dr. Rose Knight. I will not be returning to this office. I visited several times and, to my understanding, paid all balances in full at each visit. Months later, I received a credit notification for a $500 balance that this office sent to collections—without any prior notice to me.

I spoke with Tanya in Billing on 1/8/2026, who confirmed this was a billing error and said a supervisor would call me back. That never happened, and the issue remains unresolved.

It is unacceptable to negatively impact a patient’s credit due to internal billing errors. I strongly advise others to proceed with caution.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Monty Gamber","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIMLI1P5m9LV86UVZ0WOVWUm7jKL1xmksJYhFn5rHHeySSFiA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been under the care of Dr. Thrash for some time now, and I can confidently say he is one of the most thorough and careful physicians I’ve ever worked with. His attention to detail and genuine concern for his patients’ well-being is evident in every visit.

Dr. Thrash and his staff go above and beyond to ensure that I stay on top of my examinations, which has been especially important given my history with skin cancer. Their proactive approach and consistent follow-up have given me peace of mind and a sense of security that I deeply value.

I wouldn’t trust anyone else to manage my situation. Dr. Thrash’s dedication and professionalism are unmatched, and I truly appreciate the care he and his team provide.

Sincerely,
Monty Gamber","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tiffany Miller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfZnDfjk4ERnn-wFNTrUVOb3B-3yyJhbHUwmKSfp5GFKAh_bc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Feels a bit underwhelming. Doesn’t feel like a thorough inspection of skin and Dr. Knight seems nervous about certain areas. 6 minutes on an annual exam does signal efficiency, which I appreciate, but also seems like a missed opportunity for education and more thorough review. Office staff are friendly and space is clean, overall experience not bad but not great.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Donnell Armstrong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqwtUS1jlmRV_2LA-Egx5Q73aAMWVfEimyPmihrrGNLelLuc4W=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I set up an appointment to visit U.S. Dermatology Partners Dallas Uptown (USDPU). I was reminded that I would need a referral from my PCP to use my insurance. I reached out to my PCP for the referral and verified that it was processed for Dr. Thrash.

I received and completed the following information that was texted from USDPU:

“Hello this is U.S. Dermatology Uptown, please click on the link below to COMPLETE PATIENT registration and update INSURANCE information. PLAN TO ARRIVE 15MIN. PRIOR TO APPT.”

Oddly, I arrived 15 minutes early to my 1:00 pm appointment only to discover everyone was at lunch. I signed in and waited. With no one in sight, I had to walk to another office to ask for a code to use the restroom.

A little after 1:00, my name was called (or at least an attempt at my name with no attempt to understand how to pronounce it correctly). There were no greeting nor pleasantries, simply “It says here that you were aware you’d need a referral.” I explained that my PCP had processed the referral for Dr. Thrash, so I would contact her office to get the referral code. My PCP is very responsive, so I knew I could reach out if I encountered any issues, assuming arriving 15 minutes prior to my appointment would leave me with ample time to do so. However, despite arriving early and completing my pre work, little grace was spared: “You’ll need to reschedule or pay out of pocket if you don’t have your referral code by 1:15.” At this point, I realized this office was not somewhere I wanted support that day nor any other, so I left.

I received a call from my PCP’s office with the code shortly after leaving but I no longer had any desire to work with this company. Although I’m sure Dr. Thrash would have been as great as reviews suggests, I’m happy that I did not start business with USDPU due to my poor front desk experience.

After calling to set up an appointment with North Dallas Dermatology Associates, the positive interaction over the phone makes me feel certain they will provide a better customer service experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Orozco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIV04-MSTilwKT-t8bcHSsz4pwfUNJTDFlU3eiBIHH7b5iacg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"12-19-25 I visited Dr. Thrash's office for a full body examination on 12-19-25. The staff at the front desk was welcoming and helpful. The check-in process was quick and my wait time to be called back for the exam was minimal. (I would suggest doing the pre check-in questionnaire on line as this will only minimize the time to wait before being seen.) Dr. Thrash's assistant, Tayler, was knowledgeable and informative. She was meticulous regarding the questions she asked in preparation for my exam. She offered helpful advice regarding how to better manage my needs and I truly appreciated her input. Dr. Thrash came in for the exam shortly after Tayler left. His demeanor was friendly yet professional. His examination was thorough and he addressed my concerns to my satisfaction. I would recommend Dr. Thrash to anyone needed dermatological assistance. The quality of service he provides is excellent.

6-20-25 I had a very positive experience at Dr. Thrash's office this past Friday. I was able to fill out the pre-appointment information at home on my computer easily and I feel this helped cut down on my time in the waiting room. The staff at the front desk, Jennifer and Denise, were welcoming and helpful. They made my first impression in this office an extremely positive one. Dr. Thrash's assistant, Jacob, led me back to the exam room. He was friendly, thorough and accommodating and more than adequately prepared me for my visit with the doctor. Dr. Breck Thrash was a pleasure to meet and work with. He was professional throughout the exam and quickly allayed any concerns I had had about my health. He answered several questions I had even before I was able to ask him. I look forward to seeing him again for my follow-up exam in six months and hope to have him as my dermatologist for a long while.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKyDK9PIhR5TmjdNvLc7quBhMfx8nCws2cV7QHqjxtBbIF8Nw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough good things about Dr. Thrash and his excellent staff at U.S. Dermatology Partners, Dallas, Uptown! I’ve been seeing him for various concerns for over a year and each time, he sees me on time, expeditiously, exceptionally competently, and manages whatever concern I bring to him. Kiley and the rest of his staff are fantastic too! The last time I saw him was a last minute thing. His staff scheduled me the same morning that I called, he took care of the problem and made sure it wasn’t anything to worry about in the long term. I don’t expect same day service routinely, and try to plan ahead normally, but that was most welcome and appreciated! I recommend Dr. Thrash without any hesitation or reservation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ellen Jeffus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJa1Znd17YUMh7QSkyfFGrUbgcSnXPwm8EMsUA5bIzSQXNdWg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been going to this office and have seen a couple of the docs as well as the PA, Rose, and all have been five stars.  Diagnoses and treatment always on point and effective, and providers and their staff always kind.  I saw Rose this week and she she is very business-like, which it seems from the other comments that some people have a hard time with, but I have seen her for myself and my husband has seen her as well and she is an excellent provider and really knows her stuff (would people be complaining about her bedside manner if she were a man? No.)

All of the providers I have seen at this office do move quite quickly so that is something to be prepared for.  It can feel stressful when they are telling you your treatment plan to follow if it’s multiple things, and they don’t typically give you anything written to take home so you have to just remember it.  Just make sure you are prepared to write it down quickly if you need that, and they are very nice and will repeat it as needed.  They always give you a sample or two if they’re able as well to hold you over until you have time to buy whatever they have recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jazmin Raymundo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4wz_yN-3GoefSahWbDBwnn4oSDm4t6E-Ru2IS8nfdNu4k2g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"went in for my appointment that was at 8am got there at 8:15 due to horrible traffic and the front desk employee said I was past my 15 min grace period, which is upsetting because I am 45 min away from the clinic and he couldn’t help me out with that instead he gave me an attitude and scheduled me for another day. I literally got there at 8:15 and he didn’t attend me till two minutes later because I saw the two employees arguing and discussing something else with the one in front of me I guess that’s why I passed my 15 min grace period. I love Doctor Rose and I don’t want to stop coming here just because of the front desk employee, but it was upsetting especially with the attitude he gave me early in the morning when I had just started my day perfectly fine.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Bud","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNqdYpWuYIlCY65P_PWF-ZMQIQrxaSbjNzb_QHSgjPvGPJiL8r=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently underwent a lower face and neck lift with Dr. Benjamin Bassichis in Dallas, Texas, and I couldn’t be happier with both my experience and my results. I also know several people who have gone to Dr. B for a variety of procedures — from fillers to rhinoplasty — and the outcomes are consistently excellent.

Dr. Bassichis is truly an exceptional surgeon. His skill, precision, and care were evident every step of the way. The same is true of his entire staff, both in the office and at the surgery center. Everyone was professional, kind, and incredibly supportive throughout the entire process, from my initial consultation to each follow-up visit.

My recovery was remarkably smooth: I had virtually no pain, minimal swelling, and I felt comfortable being seen in public within about a week. The results look natural, refreshed, and exactly what I had hoped for. It may sound strange, but I still look like myself… just a better, more rested version.

If you are considering facial surgery and want the very best, I cannot recommend Dr. Bassichis highly enough. He is an outstanding surgeon, and I am truly grateful I chose him.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amy Rickman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVb1FGAQ-9fPPI4Jft-7ESwz3GxEL-1oMHtVPkbL2xWOJdd3PE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Do not believe any review that is less than complimentary about Advanced Facial Plastic Surgery. You won't be let down!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karen Hazel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnbRS54CLty2KKNdEGmC0yuSDA-sVMaObnv0akq8-5gOD4PQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellence in every aspect. Not once did I feel like “just a patient,” but rather, a cared-for, valued client whose opinions and concerns matter. Dr Ben is the very best. My results are absolutely amazing and exceeded expectations in every aspect. I only wish I made this decision sooner.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sarah Park","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKE4iCoWZNP9_eDGVgC2147CpT9K0QDkiRI5-Zrlh4Dx2eHc2M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’ve never been more disappointed by a doctor’s office. After the procedure, which was completed in the office, the follow up was incredible. We went back for about a year at different intervals so Dr. Brobst could make sure he was still satisfied with the results which was pretty incredible. From my experience I would highly recommend Dr. Brobst.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James Greenwell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpj0wP_qt30G6RW33T60ENUQK0qCepHZxWXKIATNqlRl0uwq0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our son had severe trauma to the corner of his mouth while playing 7 on 7 spring football. I had a spot on my nose that I needed removed. It was on the very tip which is a hard spot to deal with. Dr. Brobst did it with ease! Him and his staff are so welcoming and genuinely kind. Dr. Brobst listens with intent and care! He truly wants to help. I will absolutely recommend all of my friends and family to him. I will be going back for anything I need in the future as well. Thank you, Dr. Brobst and staff!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lucas Shaw","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLs7ouHfpqQS1NetAgs8Vc8JvWVn3mNb6UOzli7f3U-AQRJ-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the moment I walked in, I felt comfortable and well taken care of. The consultation was thorough, all of my questions were answered, and the actual treatment was quick, gentle, and virtually painless. I was so impressed by the doctor’s precision and eye for detail. The results are natural, refreshed, and exactly what I hoped for. I’ll definitely be coming back and highly recommend him to anyone considering aesthetic treatments.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carolyn Atkerson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLpZJ6qyIGUfbMQogb7u6JTrKyX3i5fWG35E6BxVk_uUOVfXA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our family has been seeing Dr. Brobst for several years and every procedure he undertakes is done with absolute meticulous care.  His bedside manner is unlike any Dr we have known.  We trust him completely.  Every person in the office just could not be friendlier or more professional.  I love my visits with Amanda, Lauren and Hannah.  These ladies are so knowledgeable and make every visit special.  Thank you, thank you, thank you!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Goff","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSncYjIsVNSezImx738U-0YhnoEWIV_hoF-QjL8bvvWbEYgA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot speak highly enough about Dr. Brobst and his exceptional expertise as a board-certified plastic surgeon. My journey with him began over nine years ago when he performed two procedures on my face, and prior to that, a deep face and neck procedure recently. From the very first consultation to my most recent experience, I have always felt confident and reassured in his care.

Dr. Brobst is not just an outstanding surgeon, he is a true professional who listens attentively, exercises immense patience, and genuinely cares about his patients. Unlike many medical professionals, he takes the time to thoroughly understand concerns, explain procedures in detail, and ensure that every step of the process is comfortable and clear.

My deep plane facelift required a bit more time than usual, but what stood out to me was the dedication and precision of Dr. Brobst and his team. They never rushed, ensuring that everything was done to perfection. His staff is equally wonderful—warm, professional, and always making patients feel at ease.

Now, with latest procedure,  I am satisfied  and thrilled with my results. The natural-looking transformation he achieved has not only enhanced my appearance but also boosted my confidence. I wholeheartedly recommend Dr. Brobst to anyone considering plastic surgery. He is truly one of the best in the field, and I am beyond grateful for his skill and care!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leigh Koritke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVySQAIhb4NmcVN8KVRwjx2HfSihj2idNWJV1Fgn28FvpftnnBg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Brobst came highly recommended by my dermatologist when I inquired about sagging skin on my face and neck after weight loss.  My eyelids were also becoming heavy and I always looked angry and tired. I had become increasingly bothered by what I saw in photographs and in the mirror.  My goal was to LOOK LIKE ME AGAIN. I've seen the results of procedures that successfully help people look younger, but often they end up looking like an entirely different person... a little freakish even.  I was hoping for more of a restoration versus a new build.  Post-surgery, THE RESULTS ARE AMAZING.  I do look like my younger-self but not overly young.  Instead, I look happier, healthier, and well rested, but STILL ME. I went from haggard to zen.  Dr. Brobst and his team have been phenomenal throughout every step of this process. The after-care has been amazing. Everything about this experience has FAR EXCEEDED MY EXPECTATIONS. If I had to do it over again I would choose Dr. Brobst and team in a heartbeat. 10 out of 10.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETxcjxqR_2sHK-1Rw97UZ8AXTuiney1zvxRksj1xqX_4yjpY1WTtnSsGN9Kdz298gaYAPE46LfjgZ6yR82ydnJfU69jLMe3cdNI_B4AKVdc9FfCuGve81EDlipSXe7wJac83mSR9rRtIq4","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETqEO5AsifuoWU-QYJrstTRvaD15gaStRvEIESr4Ug3kKm3CaED7CpT923lmxOtaV22QIZPYW5gkksUTaHnPgw5Lh0CyXA5zguUSHoHwOz5BKcvD8zJo1I0G4DEyad-JCRnGlVYHt4KjSVK"],"When":"2025-9-8"},{"Name":"Natalie Pence","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUme33Cu-8M8kAd-BtVGKMGtF4kmq0URHkPV-pppsZa1vkItD8Z=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a deviated septum from physical trauma. I ended up only fixing my nose structurally and not aesthetically, which was covered by my insurance. Any surgery to your face will leave you with quite the recovery. I used to snore all night and I know there’s a lot of reasons for snoring but fixing my nose has cleared up AT LEAST 70% of my snoring. Not to mention it’s wonderful to breathe!! It took me a long time to decide to get this surgery and I wish I had done it sooner. Breathing well increases so much in your life, being able to exercise, eat, and sleep better is a life changer. I cannot stress enough how incredible Dr.Brobst and his staff are. They are so kind, and honest about everything. Dr.Brobst did a wonderful job with the surgery, and my nose healed beautifully. They are discreet with the follow up appointments while you’re recovering. Their communication is all around excellent. I 10/10 recommend this practice.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Jermaine Mackey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1kfUDPMjJMyDgYNbp5QsvsMtx1hOiXgqvz74cqRGxahxaSw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Kevin R. Hanz and his entire team are truly exceptional. From my very first consultation to post-op follow-ups, I felt informed, respected, and genuinely cared for every step of the way.

I had a Male Chest Skin Excision and Abdominoplasty, and I couldn’t be happier with my results. Dr. Hanz took the time to explain the procedures thoroughly, set realistic expectations, and answer all of my questions. His expertise, precision, and attention to detail are outstanding. The results look natural and have already made a huge difference in my confidence.

The office staff and surgical team were just as amazing—professional, kind, and supportive. They made what could have been a stressful experience feel smooth and reassuring. Recovery instructions were clear, and any time I had a question, they were quick to respond.

If you’re considering cosmetic or reconstructive surgery, I highly recommend Dr. Hanz. You’ll be in excellent hands.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Janna Davis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0tfJMDVcxG11TMIqxNqL8udYAfqV8CH-ufTfQUojaMYtkPw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would highly recommend Dr. Hanz to anyone considering a plastic surgery procedure. I love my results as they have been life changing for me by giving me more confidence about my appearance and have also really inspired me to continue with my weight loss journey. I am very grateful and thankful to Dr. Hanz, the nurses, and staff! Dr. Hanz is truly a miracle worker as my results have been exceptionally beautiful and very natural looking as well!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Krystalyn Geissler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_XtmKEFwyn9j1CV0fdcqzdmIBnxOAHnt3ktWg8nXup5PMJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Dr. Hanz's office for your aesthetic needs. Jackie is incredibly sweet and helpful. The office is clean and comfortable. I had the pleasure of working with Amy for my first appointment where she kindly reviewed my options for Botox. She was so kind and informative. We ended up deciding to use Dysport for my aesthetic goals and I couldn’t be more pleased with the results! Amy made sure I was comfortable and walked me through all of my concerns. I strongly feel that I can trust Dr. Hanz and his team wholeheartedly. I am so impressed with the staff, and even more impressed with how good I feel after my appointment. I will definitely be returning!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Unicorn Carrie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKMiU-mwajeVzO9jyg0FPK4NCxqSbmfxBd3WYE8DSKIB6DT7A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Selecting a plastic surgeon can feel daunting. I read countless reviews and had consultations with several surgeons before finding Dr. Hanz—and I’m so glad I did.

From the very beginning, the staff and facility were outstanding. Communication is seamless; it’s always easy to reach someone with a question or concern, which made a huge difference throughout the process.

I had an arm lift and a mini thigh lift, and I am completely in love with my results. For the arms, Dr. Hanz placed the incisions perfectly—well hidden from most angles and primarily on the inner arm. I was mentally prepared for a harsh scar, but my healing has been amazing. At just 8 weeks post-op, my scar is already a thin pencil line. The pre- and post-op do’s and don’ts they provide are true game changers and clearly make a difference in healing.

My mini thigh lift has also been incredible. There were a few minor bumps along the way, which is expected given how much that area moves, but Dr. Hanz provided consistent reassurance and very direct, practical guidance (yes—use the blow dryer after every shower; air drying is not an option!).

I also can’t say enough about the anesthesiologist—she was so incredible. She immediately put me at ease by chatting with me about my bikes (I’m a cyclist), which completely calmed my nerves.

Overall, my experience was excellent. I felt comfortable, supported, and well cared for at every step—from booking the consultation and discussing costs, to surgery, follow-ups, and navigating any moments of concern. I highly recommend Dr. Hanz and his team.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESmIgBo0z_BCc6kEAgUpVDM6fy2UN-p5ec-grrkao2npWo0BEQXQ91zI4tw0YCyaZcu-0yd7y2qnFFB2sKCQM4X7yXFG49a5buo02OsRyEC2brR1uLsZzJvB50wSya-b0Nl3pUVhhuSMzBd","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQ5srvvI457QCKJnCp35bMC9FWWEoM9wfcgbAbd4CHc8quWsVyZYJOAXUegrW0IqiVIJRiO0rBSACwM_80CD3VyXPOsKZiAgFw37phlqkq9VSM36tpYBKuEC6Z_LZPnWxMUrWcRIBxMNwlX"],"When":"2026-2-5"},{"Name":"Molly Green","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK54OEXyM0wkeNaRZ-ZGMvq7ljLLe5fE9LI8qp-iPBA9IVB-A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough good things about Dr. Hanz and his staff. They are truly the best! I had a mommy makeover and every step of the way they are there to help in any way with outstanding results! They are now like family to me. That’s how much they truly care about each patient. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Louise Cottel Crain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVt1W6TdWwqi_PdV_gKFTeLVeRsZpi0EWcdeslh4YryqRHh7l6AbA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have had multiple plastic surgeries with Dr. Hanz over the years, and he consistently goes above and beyond my expectations with my results! [{"Name":"Elizabeth Waggle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIt2w5ZwKUTfULGkc9sAc6Kt_jCvsOr1g2y_7SKLLCcwwXe8w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just moved to Dallas and finding this place has been such a blessing. I came in today for a spot on my leg, and once again, the team reminded me why I love this place so much!

Maya is always so warm and welcoming, and she helped me find the right sunscreen without making me feel rushed. Kathie and Becca made my biopsy quick and painless, listened to every concern, made me feel truly heard. Even Dr. Daniels, who I met briefly, radiated kindness.

As someone who loves aesthetic treatments but also struggles with psoriasis and random skin issues, it means so much to feel genuinely cared for. This team doesn’t just provide treatments, they make me feel safe and valued. I’ve come in for a few appointments in the past as well however my experience was the same every time - minimal explanation from the doctor on my condition and subpar customer service from the receptionists. My most recent visit with them, the doctor told me they discontinued a chemical peel that would potentially help me because it wasn’t profitable enough for them. When I asked about laser, they were very transparent with me and said the laser was not “melanated-skin friendly” so it wasn’t worth spending on. Speaking with other professionals outside this office, they’ve explained to me that while melanated skin have a higher risk with laser, there are still lasers out there that accommodate for the pigmentation and if treated with proper care, it can be highly successful.

This left me with a bad taste in my mouth, esp for a well regarded office in highland park. Kind of told me everything I needed to know and I gave them multiple chances.

I had already don't my phone consultation and paid $250 to book my appointment plus printed and filled out all my paperwork. I was told as soon as I arrived that they would charge me the rest of the amount around $1108. An Indian nurse sent me to the room just to let me know it's a lengthy procedure and wanted to know if i qualified, she found the smallest bump and took a picture and the blew it up and told me she was going to show it to the doctors. She comes back to tell me  not a good candidate and the doctor doesn't recommend me to ever get this procedure. I really thought she was kidding, for such a small blemish and someone that doesn't get ingrown hairs and i literally don't have anything else going under my armpits . The doctor never came in to see me or apologize. It all seemed like she wanted to find any excuse not to do this \"lengthy\" procedure but they were quick enough to charge me and now i have to wait 3 days for them to refund all my money. If this is their professional opinion, my professional opinion to them is to at least have the doctor go into the room for a minute to verify or to apologize that he made you drive an hour when nobody advised you that a super small blemish that is hardly visible could discualify you from the procedure and on top of that charge you for the consult and the treatment so they can just send you back home 5 minutes after you get there and have you wait another 3 days to get your money back. Honestly it really seemed like this nurse just didn't want to work or do this lengthy procedure. They would also call me later that afternoon to book my next appointment, computer was acting up. They failed to mention, they were $140!!! No worries! Paid it in full! The prescription was NEVER called in! They never called me to book my laser appointment. On May 25th I called the office to follow up on both, spoke to Iris and she said sometimes they have \"issues\" with CVS, she would check with Clair and call me back. I never heard back. Note to self, never buy a Groupon if you want quality service from this company AND never use this company again!!! Stick to national laser institute!","Images":null,"When":""}]
