I wasn’t able to eat before trying this because I suffer from migraines that are triggered by preservatives in most foods. Botox didn’t work in the past for me but Ellory didn’t turn me away she kept trying until we found that Dysport works better for me and she found the perfect dosage. It started out for beauty purposes and it ended up being a life saver for my migraines that were leaving me debilitated. Plus it’s nice to have a wrinkle free forehead because I had deep lines like a pug before but you would never know that now that I get Dysport. I’m a special needs mom and it was hard to take care of my disabled son whenever my limbs weren’t working from migraines but now that I see Ellory and get Dysport every so often, I can live my life migraine free and be there for my son! She will recommend waiting a little longer if you come too soon because she actually cares about her clients and their results. I was over filled by another injector before I met her and when I found her she was honest but in a nice way about my botched filler and instead of making me feel bad about it she immediately helped me fix my lips and the shape! I don't think the door was shut to the room and someone else (the receptionist?) walked through while I had a mask on opening and shutting other doors. (Which she also had mentioned)

Was told to do the treatment again - I had to be the one to ask if maybe another treatment would be better like c02 laser and she said it could cause scarring. (Spoiler, I did in SEOUL KOREA for $60 for BOTH and NO SCARRING and BOTH FADED!!) she even said it was maybe because she did the laser lightly as she wasn’t sure as to how it would react. I feel like a lot of people here just do not have the experience and skills to do procedures like these, and still try and sell the customers on hope. I'm definitely a continued customer now and highly recommend them","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"vanessa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmAwT2sll-p6zaKfP5xBv8RcFGNCzCedkWPHp9XeFpcRuoBLo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Legit WASTE of TIME & MONEY 😭 ugh - I do not want to sound like a “Karen” which is why I’ve refrained from leaving a review - but honestly if it could help someone else maybe it’s worth it.

I did the Pico Laser supposedly to help “fade” my two small flat moles that I have on my nose. The downtime was almost like TWO WEEKS & I paid around like $500 for both to “fade” with the treatment. And of course, did NOT FADE AT ALL. I was told it should fade at least a bit which I expected but literally looked the same if not DARKER?? And was told she did not “go deeper just in case of how I would react to the treatment” but of course I had to PAY AGAIN to do another round for it to “MAYBE” fade AGAIN?

(I DID NOT do it again) - and instead recently went to SEOUL KOREA where they did the treatment with a co2 Laser for like $60 FOR BOTH MOLES - and BOTH ARE NOW FADED !! (NO DOWNTIME !!) Never again will I get a treatment here in the US because it seems like a lot of people are just not experienced as they claim to be and especially for the amount of money being spent. I also had breast augmentation with him and he did an amazing job with my surgeries. I went for consult told him what I was looking for and it made it happen. The nurses are very nice and attentive, the staff Drs amazing as well.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Thảo Nguyễn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfRGQQMcNGO7_lRVYa3Iv7HHzxgkAtoB-EK0O72s6vnJp51Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Tomur,  Dr Hoxworth and the surgery team took good care of my upper eyelid surgery.  My friends already asked  about the doctors and I would recommend that UTSW Residence Plastic Surgery is a great place to change our look. Thank you 🙏","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ram E","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIk2XaIYZ-QcMmd35Jy4MuVfUUZ4Wa1h0-jZkGQXBeLOSkIzdw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Went in for a plastic surgery consult and somehow got hit with unsolicited medical advice from a resident who clearly thinks a stethoscope makes him a general physician. He took one blood pressure reading while I hadn’t eaten or drank water all day and immediately starts talking about hypertension like it’s a confirmed diagnosis. No second reading. No context. Just vibes.

Then comes the classic “your BMI is too high” line. I’m 6’0”, 225, and I lift. BMI is a trash metric for anyone with actual muscle, but I guess that doesn’t matter when your knowledge stops at what the chart says.

I literally explained that I have muscle mass and that BMI doesn’t apply to people like me. He nodded, pretended to understand, and still told me I need to lose weight and go to a clinic to get checked for high blood pressure and probably start meds. Off. One. Reading.

Next day? Blood pressure was 120/83. Perfectly normal. Like I said.

You’re a plastic surgery resident. You’re not my primary care doctor. Stick to the mirror work and leave actual health conversations to people who know what they’re doing.

Also the lack of unprofessionalism at this place is astounding. After my time with the resident some coordinator came in to explain the cost of my procedure. When I had questions and concerns she walked out to ask the resident. When she walked out I heard her telling her colleagues about my concerns and they all proceeded to laugh everytime.

I asked her about local anesthesia (widely known type of anesthesia) instead of general anesthesia and she thought I was requesting no anesthesia for my procedure and that’s when she gossiped to her colleagues. She didn’t even know what local anesthesia is.

Waste of time. The system’s cooked, and this just confirmed it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Danielle Wyatt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVe9zkBn-suSH6-LKsej-AsNPhfVnkQTdhYHF9_gc7XN1LFt85-Tw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Randalyn Houser","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhoE6813SWBUdfDNRkTVIpOexVIgR6FsOp6NOYqi9XglTmdw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After 4 pregnancies, the last of which I carried twins to 2 days shy of full term, my body had been stretched to its limits and beyond. I've always been proud of my body and the amazing things it has done but I missed looking on the outside like I felt on the inside- strong and confident. My ab muscles were very separated and caused my body to compensate in ways that created pain in other areas especially my back. I had a ton of extra skin in my belly and after nursing for a combination of  6 years my breasts were drooping in ways I didn't know an A cup could droop. After my initial consultation with Dr. Lee I knew he was the right doctor to put my trust in for the procedures I wanted. Everything about him and his practice is professional, caring and trustworthy. You can tell that he is a perfectionist and takes a lot of pride in practicing with excellence- in both the artistry of surgery as well as relationally with his patients. My actual procedure went very smoothly and recovery, although not easy, was very manageable and I could not be more pleased with my results! When I went in for my two week follow up I passed out in the chair during my appointment (I don't do well with medical stuff and apparently even snipping the ends of my stitches was enough to do me in). I woke up hearing Dr. Lee say "you take care of people all the time, just relax and let us take care of you." user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Adam Palmer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWh7gbVg7sWSdpusW8N9HFNFForil_A85SiaGaUloC3qA96k4Iu=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I can’t say enough great things about Dallas Plastic Surgery Institute. This place is truly next level.
We both come here for Botox, and my wife also gets a lip flip—every experience has been amazing. The facilities are beautiful, the vibe is welcoming, and most importantly, we genuinely trust the people who work here.

Erika deserves a huge shoutout. She’s fantastic. You can tell she’s a true professional who’s been doing this for a long time. She knows exactly what you need, explains everything clearly, and makes you feel completely comfortable, even if it’s your first visit.

We were originally going to stay with Renew MD Spa in Southlake, but unfortunately our experiences there started to feel more like we were transactions than people. Dallas Plastic Surgery Institute is the complete opposite—personal, attentive, and detail-focused. We don’t mind making the trip to Dallas at all because the care and results are absolutely worth it.

We can’t wait to keep coming back for a very long time… forever young vibes only. ✨","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karen Starnes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6JUZMBKD3DBDzJ9fxP_ACqcNB0Q4_vw8LpAPPkuUsfK0cw6M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Dr. Jay Burns is not honest, deliberately leaves out details and should have his license suspended.  I needed 2 additional surgeries to correct what he screwed up on my face-lift. When Dr. Rohrich saw it, his exact words were "who did this to you"?  I at first refused to tell him "Dr Burns" so his next question was "did you let that ENT in Fort Worth fo this"?","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Eliana G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI15OBiFwWkIJiOJYSIaXA0OitWIZVoG7yNJDXiIH2v2FdHqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I loved my experience with Dallas Plastic Surgery Institute! It took a lot of self reflection to decide that a procedure was the right move for me, and the entire staff made me feel comfortable and prioritized through their whole process. The facility itself was top of the line and I could not recommend the post-op experience at the Cloister more. The confidence I gained through my entire experience has truly been life changing and I am so grateful to Dr. Hubbard and his team for a newfound sense of freedom.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lauren K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4DhRsUOyt5XqIB6Cxsh3hunFhg7QG5CQtzQe4gZF9UAzB3Iw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I wish I could give Dr Fisher way more than 5 stars. Secondly he followed up with me when I returned home to personally make sure I was doing well. Something like that may seem so simple but it was huge for me. Also I stayed over night at the Cloisters Postoperative Recovery Facility and I must say Diana, Tammy, and Diane took such good care of me. I felt like part of their family. If you’re in between doctors and trying to make a final decision, I would say you can’t go wrong with DPSI.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angel Hernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKMjmvrlYQ5GkTdgQ3m5sxLP86JPOovt6vHkhLszyAj3MIG2w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had a fantastic experience at Dallas Plastic Surgery Institute. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Tonia Navaro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKW0vxY04zx68XXaNP3LvSHM8PK2yhswTItPKuu3jTFgyVo7A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came in for a facial with Meagan Rodriguez it was quite literally life changing. My décolleté was glowing and she suggested a laser treatment for the pesky broken capillaries around my nose. I brought in my current regimen for her review and she mentioned a few key ingredients that would take my results to the next level. I purchased two products a vitamin C and SPF and have been using them for a month now and literally I am STILL glowing. I see her again in two weeks. I can’t wait for my next session. Meagan is thorough, detailed, passionate and informative. You can tell she loves what she does. Hands down the best Aesthetician and Laser Technician I have ever been treated by. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Susan Moore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5CQho2EpNRihTYAwuzcs8_fwM2XlW1MJhPrkrVnmXv4waH6Y=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Huertas and office make your surgery experience very comforting.  They explain everything from very beginning.  Dr Huertas is a very warm, compassionate & knowledgeable man.  I really had no anxiety going into a liposuction surgery because of him but the experience was even better than I expected.  I’m in my mid 60’s and really wanted to look better in my clothes but surprisingly I look better than I’d hoped.  Some discomfort after but mine controlled all with Motrin- Tylenol. Definitely not something to have anxiety about- do this for yourself.  I shouldn’t have waited as long as I did - but only did it because of him being the doctor with his kind bedside manner.  I am now as happy with his staff !  I’m 66 -now wear belts and wear whatever I want not try to cover up anymore! - no matter your age do this for you!
Susan","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Judith Reed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8NGc4dcJfTephSi8Eno6DWtvQxc21rz7IGKWp4YbGMji2_7M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I can only share from the Hormonal side of Dr Huertas not the plastic surgery side.

This has been a horrific experience. After getting the pellets inserted 09-24 I have had multiple periods, lasting 4-7 days, cramping and horrific breast tenderness. I have called several times only to be told to wear a sports bra and double up on my progesterone pills. These side affects were normal! I had all the blood work done before I went in, so he obviously didn’t even look at my prior levels and overdosed me on estrogen.. I had been on an Estrogen patch prior to the implant with no bleeding.

I did not like his bedside manner. He stood towering over me the whole time, laughing at my questions. I never received a follow up call to see how everything was going after all these concerns. Several times I was told I was speaking to the nurse, but I know it was the girl at the front desk, since when does the nurse answer the phone on multiple occasions? Obviously, I do not recommend this doctor for your hormonal needs.

I live pretty far from Dallas, but I will always make the drive because I haven’t found anyone even close to as good as her.

McKinsey really listens to what you want, takes the time to talk through your goals, and is refreshingly honest. I appreciate that she will tell you when something may be too much or when filler isn’t necessary. She genuinely cares about natural, beautiful results, not overdoing it.

The Cult Aesthetic itself is absolutely beautiful, clean, and calming. The entire staff is warm, welcoming, organized, and professional, which makes the experience even better. Every visit feels thoughtful and personalized.

If you’re looking for an injector you can trust completely, McKinsey is it. I wouldn’t go anywhere else.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQJ4RVtKWh2Dx_taFZRth4A6POeCzswLjvAbVbgvJ6C-pjIm7APPf8fuHnH_HBXi_KDa3PF1vtuJ57vyN8NWZtf4RI6GnqXHNinakbaEAPNO78anOjA6nzAPFaka2NE4o6uhQlB2usW4pBR"],"When":"2026-2-5"},{"Name":"CRYSTAL CIGARROA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5f4fQJV-S9D9CifmRZj_OjqMJEvgfVFqmnWkikWf8qBFARolG=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I absolutely love seeing Stephanie at Cult Aesthetics. I’ve had microneedling with PRP and smooth threads, Botox, and lip filler, and every experience has been amazing. She takes the time to explain everything, makes you feel comfortable, and delivers results that feel natural and confidence-boosting.

What really sets Stephanie apart is her personality. She is so sweet, welcoming, and genuine, and always makes me feel at ease the moment I walk in. You can tell she truly cares about her clients.

Her assistant Daisy is also incredibly sweet and adds to the warm, welcoming environment. I genuinely enjoy coming here and always leave feeling taken care of and happy with my results. Highly recommend Stephanie and the entire Cult Aesthetics team 💕✨","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ashley S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPmzVNpIcA7yot4IU3rvv3FcgEp9kJwUGOypNg_esdYtd0NDYZ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been seeing Barbara for years for both Botox and lip treatments, and she is truly the best of the best. Her technique, professionalism, and warm personality keep me coming back time and time again. If you’re looking for someone you can trust with your face, Barbara is absolutely amazing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jessica Perry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJMDb0LALhIGGk4xjTO3ko-a2oz0dXXOLkQcdF30Gtqnc3x=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mckinsey is hands down the best aesthetic injector! [{"Name":"Jennifer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXH_RfvnnmJ231ImG6v2g1IVUHSBCVcBNeqhAe2ZJfHHctrMBi3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I saw Dr. Bahir Chamseddin today at Dallas Associated Dermatologists. The whole experience was pretty amazing from booking the appt. as a new patient to staff, availability, check-in, exam, procedures, parking etc. I was blown away by Dr. Chamseddin; I've never had an experience like this. I had an array of concerns, and he listened intently, addressed each issue and fixed them..right there. He made time to do the procedures, even with a packed schedule. He listened to and advised on the one issue he couldn't fix and comforted me when the news was upsetting. The nurse that was helping him today was so great. [Here's to Leos!] This dude will be my dermatologist for as long as he is practicing or I'm alive.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steve Schachle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWM2fl3wTCdbT0MoEqBLkTrDOKKg-HrwV5yeKhCQCdWo0uo3Wza1Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great, spotless facility with conveniently adjacent covered parking garage, connected to office tower via a covered walkway. Good signage throughout. The offices of Dallas Associated Dermatologists were clean and organized, with plenty of seating, so as to be able to social distance.

Reception staff was polite and efficient, as was the staff during check out.

Examination rooms, again spotless and well lighted.

My only disappointments and the reason I did not give five stars were:

1 Appointment system seems to have a glitch in it as I kept receiving text messages confirming appointments that I did not have, with doctors I was not seeing. At one point I was in the system as having three separate appointments with three separate doctors, and none of the three doctors was the one I was supposed to be seeing. It took a while to sort it all out.

2. The doctor that I consulted with and who treated me was very pleasant and knowledgeable, but seemed to be in a bit of a rush to finish and get out) I have no way of knowing the reason behind this, it could be they were running behind and he had other patients waiting, etc.) but it made me feel a bit secondary).

3. The practice does not validate parking, so I needed to pay three dollars by the time I left the parking garage.

The overall experience was more pleasant, then not, and I will continue to use the practice and to see the doctor that I did, with confidence. If certain things come up down the road that would affect my opinion on that, I will update my review.

Most sincerely,
Steve","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lET-BCqOHp9b952CT8t5jNwv9OvRl8Z5qNkhKEuaSQd03O4mKwIWgGu3ACjYhr81DjvW3gqXo3aKhB0klieCdMz98LmDrFm1OO8LLxjdkI4R9JKJGwT13iWEGyifAZbbAPv8N6lJ","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lES9ojtpWKqSzbyEXszKSyjIMHyyXRYC75_xPKKkuoo_WgW1FC8WeBQkzpu3wv7g4gcRxjuhtKGKlg1XIjzMwJ-45_cqYUf1DMW6aSzz4eGv1GlpgU5DqVfZk-ovqHMl4csGP_oo","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERZsyyuM9fCoZ_ci0RlOgsSKc1h2cgE7Qie5wbA7r-kohWloZmFsTjGTVhxpQ1qkTYPuHlZp7sDpeyTxNWWBAPZ9kVySVS26ZAMGRGSF4vtc0jmeT1O6MQjWMsiVY6HeczHmzL3","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERRkmOs1eJflkMXVtSMme7eiBdNxcI4xsctRh_AUTj2sum9YR0XmLF0yk26wSPUStYpyibi-VSUYa4MIzdoqJNW-9Mm7B_le_V9ylh0ZWYzXcer93OVVN3-GaqVnLLRozzc_Oo","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESz4lWfeJWMTOPm9ElLIiHNCKqzx0_4OglFHx4KEWIHfzuM9_UHMzxt7Vj9Pdd-VqPEOnP2a_nKwmKhANWRlEQeRyBSu4_pQeVN0fHgCUdwojlPHnIMLyFNlaqM84200OC5TgwItA","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESkiTOj_Gj-ZXgXRdFiN5nnF6UEohvKwGDZGnClID7zLL_rmanPlILero1Xsa7XD2rN3zq_l3f0_s6iJt9kbZ8dr5326Vd1lEcJq8CusWHxvAgezXkxdjUYvsXkLAxsvtZRg665","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQnw5iI3yxMYpBOwVGR9X2wRH1G7g0Zi4ZgzCjWCCFz9Tv_yjt5rRZdy5RUd2yKo9qXeCDz-SzwyUKcsxiJAybAEZZQQFdpi7N-wAm0_C5rnwgwLS0AVKJ-wTw83yvBljXJbos2","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lET3s6kyEbTryAloH0r1isfCGVrgHmNZGhp4VpVZygEPJou4zlfaYcFoAkGdqCrJWl_z0ZFmyTmBxT5wxEMA3R3Hllsp5-oRETviuN5kvjvdQsrW9AW74-LAg_Xx6tvkgM9gvGpz","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lES70Q-VR9reY4kV804UdTg4ZCjzubxBrGX_WRzM3TJcBxfYFpx1BH5AO90VVJRfmJsUd5PlSkkjpfzJ9QlHvEwJ6TFs02CDS0bhD-kLyfXtuQ-g0Pccw9PWeHoNQanmHrCTN4RpPA","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESC12LylL0cuKARDagVvPVzr4GlrS-2e8vxbJG_sF4ZZauLkYVtvFCQBtDgjjfqstVGclt90RJ6OoEJg-Ayrrep7HbaeCuNRdofstpqaW-taDNNyg2H3UmPi9u8eppWKC4nw8g","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESoSfUwFFpOI24pmFiLgpubLZQ5MBKOer_JGiLH3fBcSs2arJjEIj4FwwN--L Additionally, I had a routine skin check during the same visit, and I was equally impressed with the thoroughness of the exam. Dr. Harrell was meticulous, ensuring nothing was overlooked and providing helpful advice on how to maintain healthy skin.

I’m already seeing positive results with my treatments and couldn’t be more grateful!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"amanbir singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLlyWcduVYzpEp6H8guGAqaEUmhfSaBIYNgXeYjM0ypoDcwWQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Absolutely worst dermatologist in dallas!! [{"Name":"Rob Love","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKji1kCwAsQPSOrGKE8FPp4obqdBgw51vQ-JIOHbS29ZDnPwg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Dr. Sallee and her team. I've been a patient of this Dermatology Practice for over 30 years and have received excellent care.  My previous Dermatologist, Dr. Brown, recently retired and Dr. Bridgett Salle came on board to replace her.  She and her team of PAs and nurses are phenomenal.
I have a history of basal cell carcinomas, and on my yearly skin check Dr. Sallee biopsied, 4 spots, three of which were positive.  She did Mohs surgery on my cheek and it turned out be larger than I thought.  She did a magnificent job of surgically removing the skin cancer and stitching me back up. On my follow up visit three weeks later the incision has healed nicely, and you can hardly see it.  She removed another from my upper arm a few days ago, and I'm scheduled for my third surgery on my glabella in two weeks.  I feel I'm in excellent hands with Dr. Sallee and her team.  She's also very personable, makes you feel like you are her only patient, concierge type care without the high cost.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"angelica cantu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQZ49MJKc79T9Dx3VdCUybxW7eRC3d4v7j1krsb4m9ZPCnpA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful experience at this dermatology office today. From the moment I arrived, everyone was incredibly professional, kind, and welcoming. The staff provided clear and thorough instructions, which made the entire visit smooth and stress-free. The office itself was very clean, modern, and comfortable.

I especially appreciated the transparency regarding costs—everything was explained upfront, and I felt fully informed about my options. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYljOs_2WYBreDdsP2i_odYqwFMp7JBXFvkhTmahiLz7xTu54=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I decided to try out a lip flip for a birthday treat to myself and asked my good friend to tag along! It was an incredible experience, from the minute I stepped in the entire Rejuvia team took care of my friend and I. They offered drinks, a stress ball, and awesome conversation! The girls were all so supportive, warm, and welcoming.
Avery facilitated our lip flips and you could tell she was incredibly knowledgeable and passionate about what she does. She was also the sweetest, giving us her stress relief cubes! It makes you feel more at ease when you have your appearance in the hands of a confident professional. She walked us through what to expect from the slight pain, what actually happens beyond the eye, what to avoid afterwards, and the comparisons between a few procedures. She assured us to reach out if we had any questions at all and sent us off with a goodie bag with a few face masks and fun little stuff!
It was such a fun experience for my birthday and their pricing is better than I’ve seen in the DFW area. Genuinely felt like I left with some new friends and will definitely be back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Catherine Fields","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI16NqaNBGitb0wo_DyK_IzJIHvu9z7gCXVYT5-ox8UBjxv6sQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such a good experience here! I got a lip flip and it was my first time having anything done on my face. Avery did my lip flip and she was great! She walked me through the process of what she was going to do and told me how to care for it after. Everyone was also super welcoming, will definitely be back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alexia Martin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTmModnirHFixUxMDh0-q1Vy3trgLe2B7c4Fng4N-om5bt0fSXbg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is my first time at Rejuvia Wellness and I will definitely be back. I booked a custom facial through classpass and added on a microdermabrasion service. From entering the lobby, I was greeted by two lovely women and asked about any concerns I have about my skin/current regimen or questions I had about the treatment. They were incredibly  kind and attentive! My service provider, Meike, was knowledgeable and tailored the facial to exactly what my skin needed. The facial was so gentle I was fighting sleep in the massage chair. My face is rejuvenated and this is my new favorite med spa in Dallas!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"May D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIj270Z3xPg6ait1n6iFX-nkDCtlBRS2bWakQSQdgQ2d-FV6g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"one of the most relaxing places to get a facial! i’ve gone here 3x now. Everyone here is so nice and sweet. Special shoutout to my esthetician Mieke. I appreciate her taking the time to walk through all the steps that she’s doing as well as coming up with a personalized care plan to help me reach my skin goals.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deserea Merritt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjwo75ZXfpzZdHjOCfQYtAGenHLbG_5KXGVPkui3LqbZI85RkF=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Skin so smooth, so shiny, so hydrated. I’m obsessed! Mieke knew exactly what my skin needed. She made sure to explain each step and its importance and shared new products that would maintain my skin in between facials.

Aside from my lovely facial, the medspa is gorgeous, very inviting and relaxing. I actually can’t wait for my next appointment!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETKEQY_9BDYlnaDGyo7OEtSOknLwibqB3zmKKx101dJ-CFy_bFS2KXv4d9n5zWzr10WOtA990WyWnKZCNb8pfjV1Z59tqEgvH0YweS6sRscMwGf7xqp38M2tac6EgA4Xhmt6YYUStNhGaRE"],"When":"2026-1-22"},{"Name":"Miles Hawley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUetkPVdb8-mETLbOrplizsNA5ZZcIYVZ-O4gfJO9tZvADp780C=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I enjoyed my time at Rejuvia and definitely recommend their services. Madison was great in conducting my facial and I felt very comfortable being there. The three ladies I interacted with were very kind and appreciative of me coming in.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Natasha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUmHRLykBCf35waktvnvQOgKBGgMCNjmLJ5eTRJsaenv7-msLa=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was visiting Dallas for the weekend and looking for a relaxing, pampering spa experience and Rejuvia turned out to be the best choice I could have made.

I booked the Rejuvia Reset package (massage, facial, and body wrap), and my experience was nothing short of amazing. I received a clinical massage from Mike, who was absolutely phenomenal—funny, compassionate, incredibly attentive, and even took the time to educate me on proper body maintenance. Highly recommend!

Cassitty did my facial, and while I usually don’t expect immediate results, the next day my skin looked noticeably more hydrated, softer, and clearer—no more clogged pores or acne. She was so kind and attentive.

The entire experience at Rejuvia was warm, welcoming, and truly relaxing. I definitely plan to return the next time I’m in Dallas 😊","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristina Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJw-bjl-Rd0F_4a7Ztc1ILQ28c4cXBIAeCxRDNgzi-9g-z86tUY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"is was my first time here and I’m obsessed! The place is absolutely gorgeous  I love the aesthetic! My injector was Avery, and she did letybo along with filler in my lips and chin. Avery is amazing!! so sweet, super knowledgeable, and really takes the time to listen to what you want. She walked me through how we would achieve my goals and made the whole experience so comfortable. I barely felt any pain, and she kept checking in with me throughout the treatment while explaining each step. I’ve been to other med spas before, but this one’s the best, it  gives luxury vibes. Avery took her time and made sure everything was perfect. I can’t wait to come back!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Iggy Ander","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocII8vVv4Ke0aMT6c8UiEXUk5VIHFKQWxXDpQ_dwGFc_bQ1okQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This review is long overdue....Myself and my daughters have all seen Dr. Morales several times, and we will always go back to him for all our plastic surgery needs. Would not consider going anywhere else!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Claudia Gabrielle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhJ5XnMubpe3s9hyJPbTWx1LCfARC55Kk5xCJDLm8pi34ibv2i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a family physician, I am very careful about who I refer my patients to. Having dealt with multiple plastic surgeons in the Dallas area, it is such a pleasure to have found Dr. David Morales. He genuinely cares about each person and their individual needs and is highly skilled in bringing about incredible results, even fixing what other surgeons weren't able to correct. Dr. Morales employs cutting edge techniques to deliver a quality experience with superior outcomes. You won't find a more qualified and knowledgeable, yet humble and gentle, plastic surgeon anywhere.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Mazzi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfgS3CrsWba3u-U6GPQa71WeAmCFBh769aXpHRw4mqu39CFFC1tg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you Dr. Morales for accommodating everything for me to have my surgery next week.
I was beyond pleased with your expertise.
Update:
05/11/2018
What a blessing!  What an excellent experience I would recommend Dr. Morales to anyone who is looking to enhance their bodies.  Dr. Morales explained every step along the way and made sure all my questions were answered. I was thrilled with the results of my procedure and was quickly feeling back to normal.
I would trust him with any and all of my cosmetic needs. Looking forward to seeing him again for another major procedure and bringing friends/family!Can't express enough how wonderful he is.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caitlyn Todd","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocINxS8dJ7Dl8JY3z7jZei59toowOwTCRj0Az0qTdlwPXzPJEA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I got a breast reduction and lift with Dr. Morales 5 weeks ago and couldn’t be happier with the results. He took the time to answer all my questions and concerns and his staff was always easy to reach. He did a truly fantastic job with the surgery and my cosmetic results are top-notch. The recovery has been a breeze with no issues or complications. I highly recommend Dr. Morales.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Edén de los Ángeles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXjptFGA7qB8ov3W40MOmrqPFci93ZZY76OXAgw1qE3S_dqg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an accident when I was a child and the doctor said there was no need for any type of rhinoplasty. That is, if I wanted to remove the scar in my nose. Everything was fine until I started working in a warehouse. I was experiencing breathing problems due to all the dust found in the warehouse. I found Dr. Morales while searching online for an answer to my health problem. I scheduled an appointment, we talked about the scar in my nose, the current job issues, and we moved from there to discuss about the surgery I needed. I must say that I put myself in the right hands. Dr. Morales experience, professionalism and work ethic were validated by another specialist from another medical field who said Dr. Morales has a reputation for being one of the best specialists here in Dallas. Thank you, Dr. Morales!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elizabeth Cramer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgiMpbuq6D6WvUoh5mXhZ4o787IbYcq61z-XsGfYqY-sa_zwDF=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"HANDS DOWN THE BEST PLASTIC SURGEON. I ask all the questions and could listen to him and his responses all day. He is truly the best and very knowledgeable in everything he does. I’m mildly obsessed with the office staff as well. If they didn't have to tend to other patients, I would bring a nap mat & snack pack so I could hang out with them all day. This is hands down the friendliest, professional, beautiful, and intelligent doctor and staff ❤️ you do not see very much these days in practices so to experience this treatment, is a breath of fresh air.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sarah Davies","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6yApqnjt6ccebu-BuptV_XpxKSqQjqe6Cjthm8LiFt2YYN-WoAw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been a patient of Dr Morales for 10 years. He has incredible attention to detail, communicates thoroughly what to expect and ensures that all concerns are addressed. Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rhonda Dulworth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuxGYnOynywNi5bUeIEjL5uwDs5jLwrc0K9ei17v9hpNI4iJlj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was diagnosed with breast cancer in 2012, Dr.Knox recommended Dr. Morales to me for my mastectomy and reconstructive surgery.  I had a couple of health issues to pop up along the way and have needed a couple of more surgeries and Dr. Morales has always been there, as well as his staff.  They are friendly, prompt and never make you feel stupid for calling no matter what arises during recovery.   I cannot brag on this man enough, I only wish all my doctor office visit were this pleasant.  I always look forward to Dr. Morales check ups.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Jennifer Garrison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocITO4FkXhHRF7Fo0CAU6Oru4iW9IxJHMGRHYcPoi5dF_CZV9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Incredibly disappointed with the customer experience here - I made a small purchase (for this brand) and I didn't notice an additional extra shipping fee they've added on in addition to the normal shipping charges.  UPS delivered the hand soap I ordered to another house and I reached out to Joanna Czech to see if I could get a replacement or get reimbursed and they told me they wouldn't do anything to help me because I didn't add the additional shipping charges and it was against their policy.  I didn't notice the additional shipping charges on the site when I made the purchase and it honestly blew me away how awful their customer service response was especially since it was such a small purchase - they charge hundreds and thousands of dollars for services and products daily so $50 shouldn't be revenue impacting to them.  This experience will definitely keep me from purchasing anything in the future from Joanna Czech or scheduling any facial appointments, I don't care how good Joanna Czech thinks she is, her customer-facing response team is damaging her brand.  I also agree with another review that stated Joanna Czech has really gone down and for the money you spend here, it should be top notch. I will continue being a loyal customer of House of Preservation who earns your business and provides excellent customer service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Meghan Markowitz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_Icmge8c4OW0o5mWiD2b-gDRJRflqU1C7rt7DIySYkyWpqrU45w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really great retail service! I live in Geneva and look forward to going back to Dallas just to see her!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"PJ PJ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLbyTZpgEbOEZVaogkQzACS4o01dTsq3HZ15ITpqWq8u9gvpw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Apparently Joanna doesn’t even work with none VIPs anymore…..","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Inez Richards","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2cS11iP4KxkFJfqxytOYprPJCSL47TMmFSvGEiPq3Wl362Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just started ordering from Joanna Czech, and I have to say I love it. When I asked a follow up as to why he stated, "Melasma is hard to treat and you might not get a good result.  I advise you to talk to a dermatologist."  The entire experience was brusque and off-putting, compounded by the way he kept referring to a dermatologist consult which shut down the conversation hard.  He clearly had no desire to have a discussion and I left feeling annoyed and without answers.

Janie and Elizabeth were amazing and helped me through every pre-op and post-op visit. They were always kind, patient, and supportive, and made sure I felt comfortable and informed every step of the way.

Dr. Farris is by far the best doctor! He also performed my sister’s surgery, and seeing how great her results were made me confident in choosing him. I’m so grateful I did. My results look incredibly natural, exactly what I wanted, and I feel more confident than ever.

I’m truly thankful for Dr. Farris and his entire team and would highly recommend them to anyone considering surgery.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Reece Cho","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6QKOoqFdo7ULDZpM8koFoIrSj2eNmy7npbhNWqcRgnAVC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an amazing experience with Dr. Zachary Farris and his entire team. I had a more complex medical situation that required extra planning and coordination, and Dr. Farris went above and beyond to make sure I felt safe, informed, and fully taken care of every step of the way. He and his staff were incredibly attentive and accommodating, which made a huge difference in easing my anxiety before surgery.
The assistants and office staff were also extremely friendly, supportive, and welcoming throughout the entire process, from consultations to follow-ups. Everyone made me feel comfortable and genuinely cared for.
I was initially very nervous about getting breast implants because I wanted noticeable volume but was terrified of looking fake or unnatural. I trusted Dr. Farris’s expertise and asked for his honest opinion on what size and profile would best suit my frame. He helped guide me to the perfect choice, and I’m so glad I listened.
My results already looked natural at around 2.5–3 months post-op, and by 4 months they look absolutely amazing. They fit my body beautifully and exceeded my expectations in every way.
I’m extremely happy with my experience and results, and I would absolutely recommend Dr. Farris to any friends or family considering breast augmentation or similar procedures.Thank you so much to Dr. Farris and his team ❤️💚and Merry Christmas","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Denise Ibarra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKuahgOBkd8f35SggNuDOB4CwDyguIWyro3SCrxtfURJ_QadA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough wonderful things about Dr. Zachary Farris and his incredible staff! I had always wanted a breast augmentation but was hesitant. After having two children and breastfeeding both, I lost a lot of volume and developed a tuberous look. I did extensive research, met with other surgeons, then saw Dr. Farris featured in D Magazine. I saw his work, read so many positive reviews, and that sealed the deal for me.

From the very first consultation, I knew I had found the right surgeon. Dr. Farris was patient, kind, incredibly informative, and created such a comfortable environment. I actually had two consults and both exceeded my expectations. He was very transparent and informed me of potential risks. He helped manage my expectations and kept them realistic.

The entire staff is just as amazing. Janie at the front desk always greets me by name and is so sweet and accommodating. Elizabeth is warm and welcoming, and together they create such a friendly, comfortable atmosphere. Leading up to surgery, John, the anesthesiologist, was wonderful, thorough, reassuring, and friendly.

The morning of my procedure,  when it came time to make final decisions, I thought I knew what I wanted, but I trusted Dr. Farris’s recommendation— and I’m SO glad I did.
Liz was right there with me, excited for me and encouraging. Thanks to the whole team, I didn’t feel one ounce of nerves, doubt, or hesitation.

The procedure itself was quick (under two hours), and my recovery was unbelievably smooth. It hardly felt like I had undergone major surgery! Dr. Farris and his team checked in on me frequently. Their care made all the difference.

Immediately post-op, my results looked amazing, I was absolutely ecstatic. Now, two months later, I am still completely obsessed with my results. My breasts look natural, beautiful, and symmetric. My confidence has been restored, and I feel incredible.

I would choose Dr. Farris and his team a million times over and would recommend them without hesitation to anyone considering breast augmentation. They are simply the best!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"phelicia hughes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeEhCfr57aKE7KdjYZMphkMNg2rTZpZX10XG1omS-WMOPuUqJpfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Farris was amazing. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carolina Balderas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXarfZmr71ikBU3CsArofiKQF-pKjZp0PIeo1J584yQdqj6cXlTnA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I carried so much shame about what my body had become. For four long years, I fought to lose the weight and keep it off, but every time I looked in the mirror, all I could see was what used to be there: every reminder of my past still staring back at me. My confidence wasn’t just low… it was completely gone.

Then I met Dr. Khan.

She listened. Really listened to my fears, my goals, and every insecurity I had tried so hard to hide. She never rushed me, never dismissed a single question, and talked me through every hesitation. She walked me through the entire journey, from the surgical plan to the recovery timeline, making sure I felt informed and supported every step of the way.

And the care didn’t end in the operating room. My healing took much longer than the six weeks I had hoped for, and during those moments when frustration crept in, Dr. Khan and her team were there, reminding me that healing isn’t linear and that my body *would* get there. They monitored every detail of my recovery, and adjusted treatments whenever necessary. The post-op support was honestly extraordinary. Brandy and Matt answered what felt like a thousand frantic emails and questions, always with kindness and patience.

And now… my results are beyond anything I dared to imagine. Dr. Khan didn’t just transform my body, she gave me back my confidence, my sense of self, and the feeling of finally being at home in my own skin again.

If you’re considering a mommy makeover or any cosmetic procedure, I cannot recommend Dr. Khan and her team enough. They are compassionate, skilled, and truly life-changing. I will be a patient of hers forever","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deaira chapman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqBwZblheZRfHYNtYCKI6_y-1dNEz6xwywG9n_hs9iCzHvRA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Kahn and her team are amazing! After posting my initial review, Nina, the Medical Spa Director, reached out to me directly to understand my concerns and offer the opportunity to return. I appreciated the accountability and willingness to listen to constructive feedback.

I came back this week for treatment, and the difference was clear. The appointment felt organized, calm, and professional. Communication was thorough, expectations were clearly set, and I felt informed throughout the entire process.

As a male patient navigating aesthetic treatments, clarity and alignment matter to me. This visit reflected the patient-focused experience I had hoped for from the start.

I’m updating this to five stars. I’ll be back.

Same building. This time, same standard. ✨

Original  Review:
This place is a real-life Upstairs, Downstairs situation.

Upstairs (6th floor):
Dallas Plastic Surgery Institute
Calm, serene, professional. The doctors actually know aesthetics, explain things clearly, and treat you like an adult making informed decisions. I left feeling confident, educated, and genuinely taken care of. Easy recommendation.

Downstairs (5th floor):
EpiCentre Skin Care & Laser Center
Pure chaos. Overpacked waiting room with people and product stacked everywhere. An employee literally reached over me to grab merchandise without saying excuse me.

I didn’t feel especially comfortable or considered in the space. There was also a Valentine’s Day–themed buffet set out, along with a raffle to enter, which added to the overall low-brow, sales-floor feeling rather than a clinical or patient-focused one.

Staff couldn’t clearly explain the procedures I asked about without repeatedly grabbing someone else. Conversations felt sales-driven, not patient-driven. Lots of “specials” focused on quantity of treatments, very little focus on whether I actually understood what was being done or if it was right for me.

Bottom line:
If you’re here for surgeons and aesthetics, stay upstairs. It’s Downton Abbey.
If you want calm, knowledgeable, patient-focused care, skip the chaos of the 5th floor and look elsewhere.

Same building. Completely different worlds.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Faye Porbeck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhzq_65-566ZB-GdPkTx2WCIMcGkXwOrCwpieQhjjvH_WrHL8S=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great service!
